description: Explicit, auditable authorizations for changes under .github/workflows/. The default remains: any workflow change fails validate-standard-ci-authority.ps1. Each entry authorizes specific workflow files for a bounded time window with a recorded human authorizer and reason. Expired or unlisted changes still fail.

authorizations.reason: Remove the seven individual validator steps that specbridge-smoke.ps1 already runs; the smoke step remains the single required gate, so no validation is removed from CI, only duplication.

Issue #1 provider-neutral CI hardening for SpecBridge Unique IA: create unique-ai-ci.yml as the stable deterministic CI check; align foundation-validation.yml to the provider-neutral validation entrypoint; delete inherited active Claude and Codex review workflows that are incompatible with the Unique IA single-provider architecture.
authorizations.authorized_by: repository owner through explicit operator chat instruction on 2026-07-20
